crime.value: Art theft from a public exhibition hall
crime.quote: He looked at the empty easel, standing next to him. He yelled in frustration

victim.value: Art owner/exhibitor whose painting was stolen during public display
victim.quote: The man stopped and looked at the empty easel, standing next to him. He yelled in frustration

closed_world.value: Port town with exhibition hall, underground tunnels, and limited escape routes
closed_world.quote: The hall was large and every word echoed. Outside birds circled in the air and waves crashed against the port

culprit_and_motive.value: Tyler/the boy - motive unclear from excerpt
culprit_and_motive.quote: The boy gathered himself and stood on top of the chandelier, holding the picture of swirls and splashes

investigator.value: Guards pursuing the thief, possibly Azad and Vafa as secondary investigators
investigator.quote: two guards, holding swords, looked up at the swinging chandelier

social_world.value: Criminal underground with hierarchies - guards, crowds, authority figures pursuing thieves through formal venues
social_world.quote: more guards flooding into the halls. The crowds ran, screaming and calling to one and another.

investigator_wound.value: Vafa's trauma from sister's betrayal and blood ritual creates vulnerability around trust and emotional ties
investigator_wound.quote: ties are not good. They're like labels, they don't matter. Truth is I saw my sister again in the markets

_meta.title: ebook tyler lace thief in the shadows
